calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To The Hartz Group, Inc., The Hartz Mountain Corporation
Off Calendar Apr-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jordan M. Otis, of Moscone Emblidge & Otis LLP, Tel. 415.362.3599, for plaintiffs;
Gregory G. Sperla, of Greenberg Traurig, LLP, Tel. 916.442.1111, for defendants, appears via CourtCall.

RULING: The matter was not argued. PLAINTIFF MARK MOORBERG Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To The Hartz Group, Inc., The Hartz Mountain Corporation is granted. Plaintiff's presented proposed settlement papers at the hearing. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Denise Doucette, CSR No. 5963; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To The Hartz Group, Inc., The Hartz Mountain Corporation
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Continued To Apr-29-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARK MOORBERG'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To The Hartz Group, Inc. and The Hartz Mountain Corporation is continued to April 29, 2015, at 9:30 am, in Department 302, per the parties' stipulation. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/RBU)
